basic_details.short_information: Himachal Pradesh State Legal Services Authority (HPSLSA) Recruitment 2026 for 11 posts of Driver-cum-Office Assistant. Candidates with Graduate Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 14-05-2026, and closes on 13-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through HPSLSA official website.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Posts
